diagnoses.name: Unstable angina pectoris
diagnoses.evidence_span: chest discomfort concerning for unstable angina pectoris

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries
diagnoses.evidence_span: extensive past medical history of atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.name: Hypertensive heart disease with heart failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: His hypertensive heart disease with heart failure

diagnoses.name: Mottled rash of unclear etiology
diagnoses.evidence_span: A mottled rash of unclear etiology appeared on the patient's trunk

diagnoses.name: History of cerebral infarction
diagnoses.evidence_span: cerebral infarction, which fortunately resolved without residual neurologic deficits

diagnoses.name: Occlusion and stenosis of left carotid artery
diagnoses.evidence_span: hemodynamically significant occlusion and stenosis of his left carotid artery

diagnoses.name: Prosthetic heart valve
diagnoses.evidence_span: His prosthetic heart valve continues to function appropriately

diagnoses.name: History of Hodgkin lymphoma
diagnoses.evidence_span: past medical history of Hodgkin lymphoma treated with chemotherapy and radiation

diagnoses.name: History of malignant neoplasm of prostate
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior malignant neoplasm of the prostate treated with surgery

diagnoses.name: Former smoker with history of nicotine dependence
diagnoses.evidence_span: He is a former smoker with significant history of nicotine dependence

procedures.name: Aortocoronary bypass graft
procedures.evidence_span: placement of an aortocoronary bypass graft

procedures.name: Telemetry monitoring
procedures.evidence_span: the patient was admitted for telemetry monitoring

procedures.name: EKG
procedures.evidence_span: EKG showed no acute ST changes
